headline: BBAI vs. LDOS: Which Defense Tech Stock Has Better Upside Potential?
summary: Can LDOS' AI contract momentum, rising guidance and discounted valuation give it better upside than BBAI's riskier growth story?

headline: Leidos (LDOS) Partners with The Modern Data Company to Unify Federal Agency Data for AI
summary: Leidos Holdings Inc. (NYSE:LDOS) is one of the oversold tech stocks to buy now. On June 25, Leidos partnered with The Modern Data Company to help federal agencies unify fragmented data for AI and analytics without requiring extensive system overhauls. By integrating Modern Data’s DataOS into Leidos’ HeadWay Mission OS, the collaboration creates a secure […]
